title: DO NOT MERGE: Storing signatures in OpenShift annotations
body:
This is a proof-of-concept only for storing signatures in the Atomic Registry, using annotations on Image objects.

DO NOT MERGE this, signature storage will instead be explicitly supported per https://github.com/openshift/origin/pull/8371 .

(This is on top of, and includes all of, #43 ; only the last commit is new.)
